ksa_text: Manage test data for AI systems, including test data generation, validation, sensitivity analysis of test cases, and protection of sensitive test data.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform risk assessment whenever an AI application or AI-enabled system undergoes a major change, when emergent behaviors are detected, and/or unintended consequences are reported.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Perform risk assessment whenever an AI application or AI-enabled system undergoes a major change, when emergent behaviors are detected, and/or unintended consequences are reported.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-005 (Risk Management/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.497, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.497). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Organizational knowledge management: knowledge base platforms, lessons learned capture, knowledge sharing workflows, and content/taxonomy governance.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.497, and Risk Management (RM) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk Management KSA for Knowledge Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management competencies do not appear as Knowledge Manager requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. Risk Management is not a Knowledge Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
